# CWE-22 positive: path traversal via user-controlled filename (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-22-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

// CWE-22 Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory
// Vulnerable line: ReadFile joins user segment without confining to vaultRoot.
func ServeDocument(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	vaultRoot := "/var/data/vault"
	docName := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
	target := filepath.Join(vaultRoot, docName)
	data, err := os.ReadFile(target)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
		return
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream")
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write(data)
}
